titleStmt.title: SII 10.242: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 242. (A.R. No. 300 of 1924.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF MUKTĪŚVARA, MUKTIYĀLA, NANDIGAMA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Ś. 1121.

summary.p: States that the chief Tyāgi-Pōta made a gift of the village of Mukti-grāma, thirty cows and a crown set with precious stones to god Mukti-Mahēśvara. Gives the geneology of Pōta.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīlakṣmīśagabhīranābhisarasīsphārā
ṁbujātā dabhū dvāṇīśō jagatāṁ
pitāmaha Ivā śrībhāratīva
llabhāt . kṣōṇīrakṣaṇadakṣadakṣi
ṇabhujō bhū ddu¨rjjayākhyō nṛpastasmā
nmuppadharādhipō raya Iti prakhyātanā
mājani . tasmā nmuppadharādhipā dvibhu
rabhū tyāgāṁkadōrādhipa staddōrakṣi
tivallabhā dguṇanidhiḥ pōtakṣamādhī
śvaraḥ . śrīmatpōtanarēśvarā nmanuni
bhā drājāṁbikāyā mabhū tsū
nu¨rddānanavīnabhānutanaya styā
gikṣamādhīśvaraḥ . tasya tyāgaguṇāṁkasya dō
rabhūpasya naṁdanaḥ . tyāgipōtadharādhī
śō rājatē rājamaṁḍḍalē . Ājñā yasya śi
rōvibhūṣaṇamaṇi kṣōṇīpatīnāṁ sa
dā kī¨rtti ¨ryyasya digaṁgganāsahacarī
dīpaḥ pratāpō bhuvaḥ . khaḍgō ni¨rjjara
yōṣitāṁ paramahīpānāṁ priyā
valyaṇī ya syō¨rvyāṁ nṛpaśēkharō vija
yatē sau tyāgipōtādhipaḥ . śākābdē śa
śibhānubhūparimitē sū¨ryyōparāgē
mudā śrīmuktīmahēśvarāya ha
vi¨rbalyabhya¨rccanēbhyō dadāt . muktigrāma
mupādhinā virahitaṁ cāsāṁ gavāṁ triṁśa
taṁ rājadratnamayaṁ kirīṭa managhō
sau tyāgipōtādhipaḥ . gōṣṭi nōjvalaśa
ktiriṁdrakakubhi kṣudrācatatrāpagā kruṣṇānā
manadīyya masya hārītikhyaṁ pratīcyāṁ diśi A
śvadhaḥpratītōrukūpasahita
jñāyāsyanukī¨rtti tōntu caturassīmā
bhuvaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
